<noinclude>
This is the data entry form for '''Person''' pages.
</noinclude><includeonly>
{{{info|page name=<Person Name[unique]>|create title=Create a Person Page|edit title=Edit Person Page}}}

{{{for template|Person}}}

{| class="formtable"
! Person Name:
| {{{field|Person Name|input type=text|mandatory|size=40|placeholder=e.g., John Smith}}}
|-
! Birth Year:
| {{{field|Birth Year|input type=text|size=6}}}
|-
! Death Year:
| {{{field|Death Year|input type=text|size=6}}}
|-
! Occupation:
| {{{field|Occupation|input type=combobox|values=Farmer,Merchant,Carpenter,Blacksmith,Soldier,Sailor,Lawyer,Doctor,Minister,Teacher,Laborer,Clerk,Other}}}
|-
! Birthplace:
| {{{field|Birthplace|input type=text|size=40|placeholder=e.g., New York, Ireland, Germany}}}
|-
! Census Years Present:
| {{{field|Census Years Present|input type=text|size=40|placeholder=e.g., 1860, 1870, 1880}}}
|-
! Associated Properties:
| {{{field|Associated Properties|input type=tokens|values from category=Properties|delimiter=,}}}
|}

{{{end template}}}

'''Free text:'''

{{{standard input|free text|rows=10}}}

{{{standard input|summary}}}

{{{standard input|minor edit}}} {{{standard input|watch}}}

{{{standard input|save}}} {{{standard input|preview}}} {{{standard input|changes}}} {{{standard input|cancel}}}
</includeonly>
